items.title: New KV cache compaction technique cuts LLM memory 50x without accuracy loss
items.summary: Enterprise AI applications that handle large documents or long-horizon tasks face a severe memory bottleneck. As the context grows longer, so does the KV cache, the area where the model’s working memory is stored. A new technique developed by researchers at MIT addresses this challenge with a fast c

items.title: Google PM open-sources Always On Memory Agent, ditching vector databases for LLM-driven persistent memory
items.summary: Google senior AI product manager Shubham Saboo has turned one of the thorniest problems in agent design into an open-source engineering exercise: persistent memory. items.title: Listen to this: Mabe Fratti’s experimental cello pop

items.title: The best Switch 2 controller just got better (and a little worse)
items.summary: Crowning the EasySMX S10 the best Switch 2 controller last fall was easy. items.title: The cute and cursed story of Furby
items.summary: The hottest toy of 1998 was sort of adorable, and sort of annoying.
